<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
w_objects = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'w']
print(f"Remaining gray (w) objects: {len(w_objects)}")

# Check left panel button area

print("\n=== Left panel button area ===")
for i in range(33, 50):
    print(f"Row {i}: '{ascii_lines[i][6:25]}'")

# Check bottom panels
print("\n=== Bottom panels ===")
for n in seg:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
    if min_row >= 50:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, bounds=[{min_row},{max(p[0] for p in b)}]x[{min(p[1] for p in b)},{max(p[1] for p in b)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
